name: Crossref Funder ROR Suggestions
description: Proposes ROR replacements for legacy Crossref Funder IDs on funding references.

status_labels.failed: Crossref Funder ID to ROR discovery failed: {error}
status_labels.already_running: A Crossref Funder ID to ROR discovery job is already running.
